name: grid
description: TypeScript library for LLM orchestration and agentic workflows

scripts.release:beta: turbo run build && npm run prerelease:enter && changeset version && changeset publish
scripts.release:stable: turbo run build && npm run prerelease:exit && changeset version && changeset publish
scripts.prerelease:enter: if [ ! -f .changeset/pre.json ]; then changeset pre enter beta; fi
scripts.prerelease:exit: if [ -f .changeset/pre.json ]; then changeset pre exit; fi
